description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the rustdocker/rust:nightly Docker image and runs a before_script to add the rustfmt-preview and clippy-preview components via rustup. Cache the Cargo home directory ($HOME/.cargo/) and the target build directory per job using a cache key of $CI_JOB_NAME and include untracked files. Define a test:cargo job in the default test stage that executes the commands: `rustc --version && cargo --version`, `cargo fmt -- --check`, `cargo clippy`, and `cargo t`, and set the variable RUST_BACKTRACE=1 for the job. No artifacts, services, or conditional rules are required.
